---
title: "Publications"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<style>
body {
  text-align: justify}

h1 {
  text-align: center
}
</style>

**Journal papers**

* **Macuch-Silva, V.**, & Franke, M. (2021). Pragmatic Prediction in the Processing of Referring Expressions Containing Scalar Quantifiers. _Frontiers in Psychology_. https://doi.org/10.3389/fpsyg.2021.662050 [<a href="https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5156186" target="_blank"><b>open materials</b></a>]

* **Macuch-Silva, V.**,  Holler, J., Özyürek, A., & Roberts, S. (2020). Multimodality and the origin of a novel communication system in face-to-face interaction. _Royal Society Open Science_. https://doi.org/10.1098/rsos.182056 [<a href="https://github.com/seannyD/multimodalCommunicationGame" target="_blank"><b>open materials</b></a>]

**Edited volumes**

* Jamieson, E & **Macuch-Silva, V.** (joint first authors, to appear). Psycholinguistic processing tasks and the study of question bias. In Benz, A., Krifka, M., Trinh, T. and Yatushiro, K. (eds.) _Biased Questions: Experimental Results and Theoretical Modelling_.


**Conference papers**

* Micklos, A., **Macuch-Silva, V.**, & Fay, N. (2018). The prevalence of repair in studies of language evolution. In Cuskley, C., Flaherty, M., Little, H., McCrohon, L., Ravignani, A. & Verhoef, T. (Eds.): _The Evolution of Language: Proceedings of the 12th International Conference (EVOLANGXII)_. [<a href="http://evolang.org/torun/proceedings/paperpdfs/Evolang_12_paper_136.pdf" target="_blank"><b>paper</b></a>]


* **Macuch-Silva, V.**, & Roberts, S. (2016). Language Adapts To Signal Disruption In Interaction. In S.G. Roberts, C. Cuskley, L. McCrohon, L. Barceló-Coblijn, O. Feher & T. Verhoef, _The Evolution of Language: Proceedings of the 11th International Conference (EVOLANG11)_. [<a href="http://evolang.org/neworleans/workshops/pdf/MacuchSilva_Lati.pdf" target="_blank"><b>paper</b></a>]
